description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a vibrant, psychedelic pattern in shades of pink, purple, and teal, with white accents. The upper is predominantly covered in a swirling, floral-like design, contrasted by white overlays and a white tongue. The shoe has a robust, black rubber sole with deep treads for traction, and the midsole is white, providing a clean separation between the upper and the sole. The lacing system is standard criss-cross with white laces threading through reinforced eyelets. The heel and collar are padded and finished in white, offering additional support and comfort. No visible branding or logos are present, giving the shoe a unique, custom appearance.
description: A high-top sneaker with a bold pink and purple psychedelic pattern, white overlays, and a black rubber sole. Features standard white laces and a padded white collar.
description_view_0: Side view showing the swirling pink and purple pattern, white overlays, and the black sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white criss-cross laces and the patterned toe box.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the same vibrant pattern and white structural elements.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded white heel and the continuation of the colorful pattern.
